caption: The video displays a static presentation slide from a course on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING". The slide is titled "Tutorial – 1" and features a mathematical formula for $y$ alongside the constant $\varepsilon_s = 0.90$. Below the equation is a data table with four columns labeled "1", "2", "f", and "g", listing values for pressure "p (bar)", temperature "T (K)", enthalpy "h (J/g)", and entropy "s (J/gK)". The table contains numerical data such as $1.013$ and $202.6$ for pressure. An "NPTEL" logo is visible in the bottom-left corner, and the footer reads "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". There are no people or movements depicted; the scene remains completely identical across all frames, showing a still image of educational content.
